prompt: Write a complete 6-piece cold-email sequence targeting AI startups (Seed-to-Series B, foundation-model fine-tuners, agentic-framework builders, model-weights stewards) for openpatent.ai. Persona pain: model architecture regurgitation by fine-tunes, dataset-design scraping, MCP-tool invention ripped off by copycat agent frameworks, no timestamped proof of an architectural insight before publishing the paper. Deliver: (1) intro email (≤130 words, hook with 'a fine-tune of your flagship model published a 6.2B-parameter copy 4 days after your arXiv preprint — the 6-layer proof would have given you priority in 90 seconds'), (2) 5-day followup (≤90 words, name the C2PA manifest + Ed25519 + Bitcoin OTS stack for ML artifacts: weights hashes, dataset schemas, MCP tool specs), (3) value-prop one-liner (≤25 words, hash your model card before the preprint lands), (4) 3 objection handlers ('We're already on arXiv', 'Weights are public anyway', 'Investors don't care about IP') each ≤60 words, (5) 1 anonymized case study (Series A agentic-AI startup in SF, MCP-tool invention re-implemented by 3 competitors within 11 days of launch, OTS timestamp + Ed25519 signing won a WIPO arbitration in 6 weeks), (6) ROI line ('$149 defensive tier vs $1.2M Series A IP round, 8,054x leverage, 10-minute Bitcoin confirmation'). Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {intro:string, followup:string, value_prop:string, objection_handlers:[3 strings], case_study:string, roi:string, signature:string}.
